name: Heliostar Metals Ltd.
description: Heliostar Metals Ltd. is a junior mineral exploration and development company focused on high-grade gold and silver projects in North America. The company's flagship asset is the Ana Maria project in Mexico, alongside the high-grade San Antonio gold project and the Unga gold-silver project in Alaska. Heliostar is committed to expanding its resource base and advancing its portfolio of precious metal assets through systematic exploration and strategic acquisitions.
